message:
fix(codegen): Fix semicolon generation for labeled blocks and statements

- Pre-generate expressions to detect patterns before adding semicolons
- Skip semicolons for labeled blocks (__mN_xxx: { ... })
- Skip semicolons for block statements (if/while/for with braces)
- Always add semicolons for one-liner statements
- Strip existing semicolons before re-adding for consistency

This fixes the 'expected statement, found ;' errors for 38 @core1 tests
by correctly detecting when semicolons should be omitted in Zig.

Next issues to fix:
- Value discard for bool/PyValue return values
- Undeclared identifiers in complex expressions
- assertAlmostEqual implementation
